content_of_post_to_comment:
Please post your plans for this date and if you can, do the following;

Give encouragement to two other posters on this thread.

Report back this evening as to how you did.

Give encouragement to others to report back also.

Good luck!
comment: I like these check-in threads because the report-back part makes the goal feel more real than just making a plan. I’ve found that even if the day doesn’t go perfectly, sharing what actually happened helps spot patterns and keeps the next attempt from feeling like starting over. Looking forward to seeing how everyone’s day turns out.
